== Notes for [[Item:Q83428|Q83428]] ==

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Utaybah_bin_Abu_Lahab
--------------------
Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Utbah_ibn_Abu_Lahab

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3142776FE1EFBC189822EF79916CA13B
geni:6000000014643000583

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
